name: Tellabs, Inc.
description: Tellabs is a global network technology company that provides advanced networking and communications solutions to enterprise, government, and service provider customers. The company specializes in Passive Optical LAN (OLAN) and broadband network modernization, helping organizations design, build, and operate more secure, reliable, and cost-effective fiber-based networks. By converging legacy and modern connectivity, Tellabs enables its clients to sustain and evolve their infrastructure to meet the increasing demands of modern digital environments. With a focus on innovation and professional services, Tellabs supports its customers through comprehensive training, technical support, and turnkey deployment solutions.
